title: Agent Run Report
description: Structured audit record for a single execution of an AI agent. Produced at the end of each run and retained for review, compliance, and debugging.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Use '0.1.0' for files conforming to the ClawMaven Open Governance Kit v0.1.0.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this run. Use UUID v4 or a system-generated identifier.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent that produced this run report.

runtime.description: The runtime or framework the agent ran on.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run started.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run completed (or was halted).

objective.description: The task or goal this agent was asked to complete for this run.

actions_taken.description: Ordered list of actions the agent took during this run.

sequence.description: Order in which this action occurred.

action.description: Name or category of the action taken.

tool.description: Name of the tool called, if applicable.

input_summary.description: Brief description of the input passed. Do not include secrets or PII.

output_summary.description: Brief description of the output received. Do not include secrets or PII.

duration_ms.description: How long this action took in milliseconds.

approvals_requested.description: Human approval requests made during this run.

approver.description: Name or identifier of the person who approved or denied.

policy_violations.description: Any policy rule violations that occurred or were attempted during this run.

rule.description: The policy rule that was violated or nearly violated.

description.description: What happened and why it was flagged.

action_taken.description: How the system responded to the violation.

tool_cost_usd.description: External tool or API call cost in USD.

total_cost_usd.description: Total cost for this run in USD.

outcome.description: The final outcome of this run.

outcome_summary.description: A brief human-readable summary of what happened and what was produced.

reviewer_notes.description: Optional notes added by a human reviewer after the run.

reviewed_by.description: Name or identifier of the human reviewer, if this run was reviewed.

reviewed_at.description: When the human review took place.
